title: Close the AgentOS 2.0 audit hardening slice for the release candidate

tasks.title: Replace the legacy CI gate with canonical multi-OS validation
tasks.goal: Run canonical AgentOS validation on Windows and Linux and keep deploy contract-only.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Harden the AgentOS CI and deploy workflows for the release candidate, verified by npm test and npm run validate.
agentGoal.outcome: CI uses npm doctor/validate on Windows and Linux, and deploy uses a bound GitHub Environment without claiming a real target.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm test, npm run validate, and workflow file review
constraints: Do not execute a real deployment.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Change the smallest workflow surface that removes the legacy validation gate.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: CI runs npm run doctor, npm run validate and git diff --check.
Deploy binds the selected GitHub Environment and stays contract-only.

evidence.criterion: CI runs npm run doctor, npm run validate and git diff --check.
Deploy binds the selected GitHub Environment and stays contract-only.

tasks.title: Align adapter installation with canonical Codex and Generic IDE behavior
tasks.goal: Use codex-layer as the Codex source of truth, preserve generic IDE behavior, and back up user files safely.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Harden AgentOS adapters with backup-safe installs verified by E2E tests.
agentGoal.outcome: Codex installs from codex-layer, Generic IDE stays .codex-free, and backups are ignored.
constraints: Do not overwrite user files without backup.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Prefer canonical copies and explicit targets over implicit in-place writes.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Generic IDE installer does not create .codex.
Backups are created and ignored by git.

evidence.criterion: Generic IDE installer does not create .codex.
Backups are created and ignored by git.
evidence.result: Adapter docs and mappings align with backup policy.

tasks.title: Enforce harness, state, metadata and docs validators
tasks.goal: Promote the remaining short-horizon contracts into first-class validation gates.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Harden AgentOS validators and release metadata for the 2.0.0-rc.1 candidate.
agentGoal.outcome: Templates, state, docs, workflows, license and secrets are mechanically enforced.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run validate, npm test and docs/REVIEW.md
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Reuse shared contract logic so validators do not drift.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Ranges outside file bounds are rejected.
current.txt and project-state.json are validated together.
validate includes doctor, state, workflows, adapters, docs, license and tests.

evidence.criterion: Ranges outside file bounds are rejected.
current.txt and project-state.json are validated together.
validate includes doctor, state, workflows, adapters, docs, license and tests.
